scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:js && bun run build:types && bun run build:assets
scripts.build:credentials: bun run build:platform-credentials && bun run build:user-credentials
scripts.build:js: bun run build:credentials && bun run build:node
scripts.build:node: bun build ./nodes/OvoparkApi/OvoparkApi.node.ts --target node --format cjs --packages bundle --external n8n-workflow --outfile ./dist/nodes/OvoparkApi/OvoparkApi.node.js
scripts.build:platform-credentials: bun build ./credentials/OvoparkApi.credentials.ts --target node --format cjs --packages bundle --external n8n-workflow --outfile ./dist/credentials/OvoparkApi.credentials.js
scripts.build:user-credentials: bun build ./credentials/OvoparkUserApi.credentials.ts --target node --format cjs --packages bundle --external n8n-workflow --outfile ./dist/credentials/OvoparkUserApi.credentials.js
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run build
scripts.dev: bun run build:credentials && bun run build:assets && bun build ./nodes/OvoparkApi/OvoparkApi.node.ts --target node --format cjs --packages bundle --external n8n-workflow --outfile ./dist/nodes/OvoparkApi/OvoparkApi.node.js --watch
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build && bun run lint -c .eslintrc.prepublish.js nodes credentials package.json
